channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Rubbish on melon road, 16th March
item.description:
Rubbish on melon road. i reported this on March 10th, it was collected but new rubbish has been dumped

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Peckham Square, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish on Melon Road, 16th March
item.description:
Rubbish on melon road. i reported this on March 10th, it was collected but new rubbish has been dumped.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Peckham Square, Peckham, Greater London

item.title: Flytip in green behind trees near car park, 16th March
item.description:
Flytip in green behind trees near car park in the entrance of kingston crescent

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kingston Crescent, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog poo again in front of kitchen window grass area, 16th March
item.description:
This keeps on happening every week there’s dog poo in front of the kitchen window grass area again can something be done regarding so it stops from happening!!!!!!!!!!!!!!.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Goldcrest Mews, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car has been abandoned for months, 16th March
item.description:
The car has been abandoned for months, hasn’t moved and mould growing on the inside

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 16, Anerley Grove, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The filthy ox, 16th March
item.description:
More rubbish & litter after another weekend congregation of delivery riders frequenting

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 4, Eden Park Avenue, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The Mickey’s Chippy food rubbish bin has yet again been pulled into the street by animals and pulled apart. This happens almost weekly especially on Sundays. Is there no collection that day? How long until Hackney sorts this problem out? It’s an awful way to deal with a restaurants waste and disgusting for people living on Pellerin Road, 16th March
item.description:
As above

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Pellerin Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 52, Lant Street, The Borough, Greater London

item.title: Mattress, 16th March
item.description:
Mattress dumped over night on the grass outside the entrance to the bungalows.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Rancliffe Gardens, Eltham

item.title: Flytipping in green area, 16th March
item.description:
Community has struck again. Dumping items in the newly cut Green area. All residents have received the flytipping newsletter. No excuse for it.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Gilbert Street, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Smashed glass on pavement and by bus stop in road, 16th March
item.description:
Smashed glass on pavement and by bus stop in road By 160 to Eltham

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Belmont Lane, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Damage - smashed glass or panels / jagged metal edges on shelter

item.title: Fly tipping, 16th March
item.description:
Rubbish continuously left on the side road With Adverse conditions like strong wind the rubbish fly and blocks entrance of private property

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Sidcup Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Domestic waste left at bin, 16th March
item.description:
Household waste across pavement including nappies and organic waste. Residents on Newlands parade need a better waste solution provided by either the freeholders or Bromley council.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Linden Grove, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: More fly tipping, 16th March
item.description:
This is a regular hotspot, maybe time for a camera on this road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Buckingham Avenue, Falconwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter, 16th March
item.description:
Hi there last week some foxes created quite a bit of litter on County Grove just beyond the school and the junction of Knatchbull Road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): County Grove, Camberwell, Greater London
